title: anthemis plutonia var. artemisioides
intro: Anthemis plutonia var. artemisioides, also known as a variety of the Anthemis plutonia plant, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Anthemis plutonia var. artemisioides include reducing inflammation and relieving pain, as well as treating digestive issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
